ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., SG, PG) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the data is recorded */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches or centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds or kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted into the league */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Overall pick number of the player in the draft */,
  "rookie_year" INTEGER /* Year the player entered the league as a rookie */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Name of the player's high school */,
  "college" TEXT /* Name of the player's college or university */,
  "last_attended" TEXT /* Name of the player's last attended school or college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference to which the team belongs */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the team's home arena */,
  "established" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the team */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team's owner */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's general manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player's ID */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "average_distance" REAL /* Average distance of shots taken */,
  "pct_fga_fg2a" REAL /* Percentage of field goal attempts that are two-point shots */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total number of assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total number of steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total number of blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total number of turnovers */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Total number of fouls committed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "game_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game log */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player's ID */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* Reference to the team playing the game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the game was played */,
  "opponent_team" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home or away) */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win or loss) */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player in the game */,
  "three_pointers" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shooting_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shooting metric entry */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player's ID */,
  "pct_fga_00_03" REAL /* Percentage of field goal attempts taken from 0-3 feet */,
  "pct_fga_03_10" REAL /* Percentage of field goal attempts taken from 3-10 feet */,
  "pct_fga_10_16" REAL /* Percentage of field goal attempts taken from 10-16 feet */,
  "pct_fga_16_xx" REAL /* Percentage of field goal attempts taken from 16 feet and beyond */,
  "pct_fg3a" REAL /* Percentage of three-point attempts */,
  "fg_pct_fg2a" REAL /* Field goal percentage for two-point attempts */,
  "fg_pct_00_03" REAL /* Field goal percentage for shots taken from 0-3 feet */,
  "fg_pct_03_10" REAL /* Field goal percentage for shots taken from 3-10 feet */,
  "fg_pct_10_16" REAL /* Field goal percentage for shots taken from 10-16 feet */,
  "fg_pct_16_xx" REAL /* Field goal percentage for shots taken from 16 feet and beyond */,
  "fg_pct_fg3a" REAL /* Field goal percentage for three-point attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shooting_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player's ID */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* Reference to the team involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, signing) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the transaction */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (active, injured, waived, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_goal_performance" (
  "fg_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field goal performance entry */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player's ID */,
  "fg_pct_fg2a" REAL /* Field goal percentage for two-point shots */,
  "fg_pct_00_03" REAL /* Field goal percentage for shots taken from 0-3 feet */,
  "fg_pct_03_10" REAL /* Field goal percentage for shots taken from 3-10 feet */,
  "fg_pct_10_16" REAL /* Field goal percentage for shots taken from 10-16 feet */,
  "fg_pct_16_xx" REAL /* Field goal percentage for shots taken from 16 feet and beyond */,
  "fg_pct_fg3a" REAL /* Field goal percentage for three-point shots */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fg_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_goal_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assists_metrics" (
  "assist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assist metric entry */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player's ID */,
  "pct_ast_fg2" REAL /* Percentage of assists that lead to two-point field goals */,
  "pct_ast_fg3" REAL /* Percentage of assists that lead to three-point field goals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assists_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dunk_metrics" (
  "dunk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dunk metric entry */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player's ID */,
  "pct_fga_dunk" REAL /* Percentage of field goal attempts that are dunks */,
  "fg_dunk" INTEGER /* Number of successful dunks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dunk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dunk_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corner_three_metrics" (
  "corner_three_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corner three-point metric entry */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player's ID */,
  "pct_fg3a_corner3" REAL /* Percentage of three-point attempts taken from the corner */,
  "fg_pct_corner3" REAL /* Field goal percentage for corner three-point attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corner_three_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corner_three_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heave_metrics" (
  "heave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heave metric entry */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player's ID */,
  "fg3a_heave" REAL /* Number of heave attempts for three-point shots */,
  "fg3_heave" INTEGER /* Successful three-point heaves */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heave_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)
